items.title: Verreynne leads Notts to One-Day Cup win over Warks
items.summary: Kyle Verreynne hits an unbeaten 68 as Notts Outlaws beat Warwickshire by three wickets in the One-Day Cup.
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
items.summary: AC Milan midfielder Luka Modric - who turns 41 in September - signs a one-year contract extension at the club.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
